title: Senior Rust Engineer at Monad Labs
description: Monad is building a high-performance EVM-equivalent L1. Seeking Senior Rust Engineers to optimize the execution engine and networking stack. Remote.

title: Solana Program Developer at Jito Foundation
description: Jito is looking for developers to build and maintain high-performance Solana programs for the Jito network. Required: Rust, Solana SDK. Remote.

title: Full Stack Engineer (EVM) at Uniswap Labs
description: Join the team building the most popular decentralized exchange. Looking for engineers with experience in React, TypeScript, and Solidity/EVM. Remote.

title: Base announces Interop Roadmap for Seamless L2 Connectivity
description: Base unveils plans for enhanced interoperability between Ethereum Layer 2s, aiming to reduce friction for users and developers across the ecosystem.

title: Starknet v0.14.0 Goes Live on Mainnet
description: The latest Starknet upgrade brings significant performance improvements and reduced transaction costs, furthering its goal of scalable Ethereum L2 solutions.

title: YieldFi Protocol awards $500k Critical Bug Bounty
description: A security researcher successfully identified a critical vulnerability in YieldFi's vault logic, preventing a potential $20M exploit. The bug was patched immediately.

title: TRM Labs releases 2026 Crypto Crime Report
description: TRM identifies record $158 billion in illicit crypto flows in 2025, highlighting structural shifts in attack vectors toward operational infrastructure.

title: Chainalysis releases 2026 Crypto Crime Report on Ransomware
description: Chainalysis report shows total on-chain ransomware payments fell to $820 million in 2025 despite record attacks, as fewer victims pay ransoms.

title: IoTeX ioTube Bridge Exploit Analysis
description: The IoTeX ioTube cross-chain bridge was exploited for approximately $4.4 million in February 2026 due to a compromised private key used for a malicious contract upgrade.

title: Ostium Protocol Bug Bounty Launch
description: Ostium Protocol is offering up to $100,000 in bug bounties for findings related to its RWA perpetuals exchange on Arbitrum.

title: Software Engineer - Solana at Rain
description: Rain is seeking a Software Engineer to own Solana programs end-to-end. Salary: $140k - $240k. Location: New York / Remote.

title: UPCX Protocol Exploit: $70M Loss
description: A major exploit targeting the UPCX protocol resulted in a $70M loss. The attack involved a vulnerability in the protocol's liquidity management system.

title: Senior Protocol Engineer at Provable
description: Provable is searching for a senior protocol engineer to design and maintain privacy-preserving ZK protocols. Required: 5+ years SWE, 2-3+ years Rust. Remote.

title: USDN Synthetic Dollar Bug Bounty
description: USDN has launched a new bug bounty program on Immunefi with rewards up to $50,000 for critical vulnerabilities in its synthetic asset logic.

title: KiloEx Vulnerability Incident: $7.5M
description: KiloEx experienced a security incident resulting in $7.5M in lost funds. Security researchers identified an edge case in the platform's trading engine.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Stablecoins at Bitgo
description: Bitgo is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for its stablecoin ecosystem. Expertise in Solidity and EVM mechanics required. Remote.

title: Loopscale Security Breach: $5.8M Loss
description: Loopscale was targeted in a security breach that led to a $5.8M loss. The attack focused on a flaw in the cross-chain collateralization logic.

title: Backend Engineer at NIGHTSEA INC
description: NIGHTSEA INC is seeking a Backend Engineer with expertise in Golang and Solidity to support its stablecoin ecosystem. Salary: $150k - $210k.

title: ZKsync Incident Analysis: $5.0M
description: A ZKsync ecosystem project was exploited for $5.0M. The incident highlights the ongoing challenges in securing rollup-based infrastructure.

title: Blockchain Security Engineer at CertiK
description: CertiK is seeking a Blockchain Security Engineer with expertise in Solidity, Rust, or Golang. Salary: $102k - $180k. Remote.

title: Term Labs Exploit: $1.5M Loss
description: Term Labs suffered a $1.5M exploit due to a bug in its interest rate calculation module. The issue has since been patched by the team.

title: Sonic Chain Mainnet Launch
description: Sonic Chain has officially launched its mainnet, claiming 10,000+ verifiable TPS and full EVM compatibility. It aims to power high-frequency DeFi apps.

title: Rust Developer at 1010 trading
description: 1010 trading is looking for a Rust Developer for EVM Systems & Trading Infrastructure. Remote.

title: TRM Labs reaches unicorn status with $70M Series C
description: Blockchain intelligence firm TRM Labs has achieved unicorn status after raising $70 million in a Series C funding round to expand its compliance and risk management tools.

title: Jupiter secures $35M strategic raise for Solana DeFi
description: Jupiter, a leading aggregator on Solana, has secured $35 million in strategic funding to further enhance its DeFi infrastructure and ecosystem growth.

title: IoTeX ioTube bridge hacked for $4.4M
description: The IoTeX ioTube cross-chain bridge was exploited for approximately $4.4 million due to a compromised private key used for a malicious contract upgrade.
